action: Detect User Entry and Save Information
fallback_action: Retry user detection automatically within the next 5 seconds. If the detection fails again, extend retry up to 3 times (5s, 10s, 15s).

recipe.steps: Understand and plan the detection of user entry.
Fetch user entry details using Helper agent.
Save the fetched user details in memory for future use.
Verify the completion of action with StatusVerifier agent.
Fetch fallback measures from the user in case the action fails in the future.
